Stats Hub
Deep player & team analysis across all saved games. Career stats, pitch breakdowns, spray charts, splits, and game history.
CAREER STATSSPRAY CHARTS PITCH DATASPLITS GAME LOGSPITCH HISTORY SPAN STATSTEAM RECORDS
Open Hub
My Team
Build and manage your roster. Import from PDF, XLSX, CSV, or TRX. Drag player cards into the lineup for fast lineup building and in-game substitutions.
Manage Roster
Opponents
Build a scouting library of opponent rosters. Load a new opponent for each team you face — import from PDF, XLSX, CSV, or TRX, or enter players manually.
Manage Opponents
Scouting Cards
Printable scouting cards for any team in your game history. Hitter spray tendencies, pitcher arsenals, count splits — one page, ready for the dugout.
View Scouting Cards

Save before switching?
You have unsaved pitch data. Save this game so your stats appear in the Hub, or skip and the data won't be stored.
✉ Send via Email
📎
Attach the data file
Click Download JSON to save the data file, then attach it manually in your email client after clicking Open Mail.
Delete this game?
This will permanently remove the game and all its stats from the Hub. This cannot be undone.
